English.invalid_language: Please choose one of the available languages.
English.ask_name: Welcome to 4kilo Gbi Gubae notification bot. What is your full name?
English.invalid_name: Please enter a valid name so we can personalize messages.
English.invalid_gender: Please use the buttons provided and choose M or F.
English.ask_year: Finally, what is your Year of study? (1-4)
English.invalid_year: Please pick a year from 1 to 4 using the buttons.
English.registration_success: Registration successful! You'll now receive customized notifications.
English.session_expired: Session expired. Please send /start to register again.

Amharic.ask_name: እንኳን ወደ 4ኪሎ ግቢ ጉባኤ ማሳወቂያ ቦት በሰላም መጡ፡፡ እባክዎ ስምዎትን ያስገቡ።
Amharic.invalid_gender: እባክዎ የተሰጡትን አማራጮች ይጠቀሙ (M ወይም F).
Amharic.registration_success: በተሳካ ሁኔታ ተመዝግበዋል! የግቢ ጉባኤያችን የተለያዩ ማሳወቂያዎች የሚደርሶት ዪሆናል፡፡.

Afan Oromo.invalid_name: Maqaa sirrii galchi akka si beeksifnu.
Afan Oromo.invalid_gender: Tuqaa kennaman fayyadami; M ykn F filadhu.
Afan Oromo.ask_year: Dhuma irratti waggaa barnoota kee (1-4) fili:
Afan Oromo.registration_success: Galmeessi milkaa'e! Ergaa addaa siif ergina.

Tigrigna.invalid_name: ትኽክለኛ ስም ኣእቱ ንምግባር ናይ መልእኽቲ ኣብ ስምካ.
Tigrigna.invalid_gender: ኣብ ተጠቃሚ ኡፍሪ ዘሎ ቦታ ተጠቀም እናተ ምረጽ M ወይ F.
Tigrigna.invalid_year: ኣብ ሓሙሽተ 1-4 ዘሎ ዓመት ምረጽ ብቕዓት.
Tigrigna.registration_success: ምዝገባ ተሳክዐ! ዝተለየ መልእኽቲ ክትበልካ ኢና.
Tigrigna.session_expired: ክፍሊት ሕሉፍ ኣቋርጽና እዩ። /start ምልኣኽ ተጀምር.
